en.editorNote: Send to the coworker with matching eye bags after a week of overtime, just to confirm you're both still alive.
variations: Short version: I'm not tired. My battery is just permanently stuck at 1%.
Upgraded version: I'm wide awake — awake enough to sleep standing up and daydream sitting down.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 職場語錄 — 遠距工作沙發審判哏

zh-tw.content:
在家上班很安寧，直到我發現我家沙發正在用眼神審判我的工作態度。

它知道我這小時開了五次冰箱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在家工作摸魚被自己抓包的午後，傳到遠距同事群組引發共鳴。
variations: 短版：我的辦公室四成是工作，六成是混亂。
貓咪版：我家主管是一隻貓，牠的考核標準是我有沒有準時餵牠。

en.content:
Working from home is peaceful — until I notice my couch silently judging my work ethic.

It knows I've opened the fridge five times this hour.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the remote-team chat on an afternoon you catch yourself slacking off at home.
variations: Short version: My home office is 40% work and 60% chaos.
Cat version: My manager is a cat, and my only KPI is whether I fed it on time.

items.sourceNote: Danfe 職場語錄 — 專業就是把過勞藏在禮貌後面

zh-tw.content:
所謂專業，就是學會把瀕臨崩潰藏在一句「好的，沒問題」後面。

語氣越平靜，內心越接近大爆炸。
zh-tw.editorNote: 收到第十封「再麻煩你一下」的信件時，傳給懂的人，一起維持表面的鎮定。
variations: 短版：我表面風平浪靜，內心已經辭職三次了。
信件版：我回信打了「沒問題」，刪掉了前面三段真心話。

en.content:
Being a professional just means learning to hide a full meltdown behind a polite 'sure, no problem.'

The calmer my tone, the closer I am to detonating.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who gets it when the tenth 'just one more quick favor' email lands and you have to keep your composure.
variations: Short version: I look calm on the surface. Internally I've quit three times already.
Email version: I typed 'no problem' and deleted three paragraphs of what I actually wanted to say.

items.sourceNote: Danfe 職場語錄 — 開會時臉部表情管理哏

zh-tw.content: 開會時我最大的成就，不是聽懂了什麼，而是成功讓我的臉沒有把腦袋裡正在尖叫的那句話說出來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開那種「本來可以用一封信解決」的會議時，傳給對面那位也在裝認真的同事。
variations: 短版：我的臉在點頭，我的心在翻白眼。
鏡頭版：視訊會議最大的好處，就是沒人看得到我桌面下的表情包。

en.content: My biggest achievement in any meeting isn't understanding what was said — it's keeping my face from blurting out what my brain is screaming.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker across the table during a meeting that could've been an email.
variations: Short version: My face is nodding. My soul is rolling its eyes.
Camera version: The best part of video calls is that nobody can see the face I'm making below the frame.

items.sourceNote: 4daywork 遠距迷因 — 上半身正裝、下半身睡褲哏

zh-tw.content: 在家上班的服裝規定很簡單：鏡頭以上是專業人士，鏡頭以下是睡褲。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給同樣居家辦公的同事，順便提醒他開會前記得確認攝影機角度。
variations: 進階版：上半身穿襯衫，下半身穿什麼，是我跟我自己之間的秘密。
翻車版：今天忘記下半身規定，站起來拿水的瞬間全公司都知道了。

en.content: My work-from-home dress code is simple: business professional above the camera, pajamas below.
en.editorNote: Send to a fellow remote worker, then remind them to double-check the camera angle before standing up.
variations: Advanced version: What I wear below the waist is between me and myself.
Caught version: Forgot the rule today and stood up for water — now the whole company knows.

items.sourceNote: Look Pretty 社畜語錄 — 能者多勞變能者過勞哏

zh-tw.content: 公司說「能者多勞」，意思其實是：你越會做事，就越沒有理由準時下班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被臨時塞工作又被稱讚「就是你最可靠」的時候，傳給同樣很可靠的同事一起苦笑。
variations: 短版：我的獎勵是更多的工作，我的懲罰也是更多的工作。
升級版：能者多勞的下一站，叫做能者過勞。

en.content: When the company says 'we give the hard tasks to capable people,' what they mean is: the better you are, the less excuse you have to leave on time.
en.editorNote: Send to your equally reliable coworker the next time you get dumped with extra work and called 'the dependable one.'
variations: Short version: My reward is more work. My punishment is also more work.
Upgrade version: 'Capable people get more work' is just the scenic route to burnout.

items.sourceNote: Mamaclub 職場語錄 — 下班時間到了卻不敢走哏

zh-tw.content: 下班時間到了，我已經收好包包、關好電腦，唯一沒關掉的，是「等老闆先走」這個隱形規定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六點整、老闆還黏在位子上的時候，傳給隔壁那位也在假裝忙的同事。
variations: 短版：我不是還在加班，我是還在等空氣可以離開。
電梯版：誰先按下電梯按鈕，誰就是今天最勇敢的人。

en.content: It's quitting time. My bag is packed, my laptop is closed — the only thing I can't shut down is the unwritten rule that says 'wait for the boss to leave first.'
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker beside you at 6 p.m. sharp, while the boss is still glued to their chair.
variations: Short version: I'm not still working. I'm still waiting for permission from the air to leave.
Elevator version: Whoever hits the button first is the bravest person in the office today.

items.sourceNote: Danfe 辦公室幽默語錄 — 一封 email 就能解決卻開了會的哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我剛開完一場「兩句話 email 就能講完」的會，作為獎勵，公司決定再開一場會檢討為什麼這場會這麼久。
zh-tw.editorNote: 從會議室走出來、靈魂已經出竅的時候，傳給一起被叫進去陪坐的同事。
variations: 短版：這場會的唯一結論，是我們需要再開一場會。
行事曆版：我的行事曆滿了，但我的待辦事項一件都沒少。

en.content: Just survived a meeting that a two-line email could've handled. My reward? Another meeting to discuss why that meeting ran so long.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who got dragged into the same room, right as you both stumble out soul-less.
variations: Short version: The only outcome of this meeting is that we need another meeting.
Calendar version: My schedule is full, yet my to-do list hasn't shrunk by a single item.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 職場幽默語錄 — burnout 連週末都像無薪實習的哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 所謂職業倦怠，就是連週末躺著休息，都覺得自己好像在做一份沒人付薪水的兼職。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週日晚上、收假焦慮開始發作的時候傳出去，附上一句「明天見，戰友」。
variations: 短版：我的休息時間，是用來幫工作充電的，不是幫我自己。
週一版：週末過得太快，不是因為快樂，是因為我根本沒真的放鬆過。

en.content: Burnout is when even lying on the couch all weekend feels like an unpaid part-time job nobody signed you up for.
en.editorNote: Fire this off on Sunday night when the back-to-work dread kicks in, with a quick 'see you in the trenches tomorrow.'
variations: Short version: My days off exist to recharge the job, not me.
Monday version: The weekend flew by — not because it was fun, but because I never actually rested.

items.sourceNote: ZenHR 職場迷因 — 遠端工作 10% 工作 90% 藏雜物的哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 在家上班的真相：百分之十是真的在工作，剩下百分之九十是確保視訊鏡頭裡不會出現我身後那座衣服山。
zh-tw.editorNote: 視訊會議前一秒手忙腳亂喬背景時，傳給同樣在家奮戰的同事互相取暖。
variations: 短版：我的虛擬背景，掩護的不是專業，是混亂。
鏡頭版：我開鏡頭的勇氣，跟我房間的整潔程度成正比。

en.content: The truth about working from home: 10% is actual work, the other 90% is making sure the laundry mountain behind me never makes it on camera.
en.editorNote: Send it the second before a video call, while you're frantically fixing your background, to a fellow remote-work survivor.
variations: Short version: My virtual background isn't hiding my professionalism — it's hiding the chaos.
Camera version: My willingness to turn the camera on is directly proportional to how clean my room is.

items.sourceNote: ETtoday 職場厭世語錄 — 「我最大的不足，就是餘額不足」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 說到我這個人最大的缺點，認真想了很久，最後得出的答案是：戶頭餘額不足。
zh-tw.editorNote: 面試被問「你最大的缺點是什麼」之後，傳給朋友當作標準答案參考。
variations: 短版：我不是不夠努力，我是餘額不夠。
月底版：我這個月最大的成就，是讓帳戶剛好歸零，沒有透支。

en.content: Asked about my biggest shortcoming, I thought long and hard, and the honest answer is: insufficient funds in my bank account.
en.editorNote: Save this for after an interviewer asks 'what's your greatest weakness' — then send it to a friend as the only true answer.
variations: Short version: I'm not lacking in effort. I'm lacking in balance — the bank kind.
End-of-month version: My biggest win this month was hitting exactly zero without going into overdraft.

items.sourceNote: Look 美日誌 社畜厭世語錄 — 「準時下班需要的是勇氣」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 準時下班從來不是難在能力，而是難在勇氣——你得有膽量在所有人都還在裝忙的時候，第一個站起來收包包。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六點整、全辦公室都在比誰撐比較久的時候，傳給隔壁那位猶豫要不要先走的同事。
variations: 短版：第一個下班的人，不是不努力，是膽子比較大。
電梯版：今天最有種的不是業績冠軍，是準時離開的那個人。

en.content: Leaving on time was never a question of ability — it's a question of nerve. You need the guts to be the first one to stand up and pack your bag while everyone else is still busy looking busy.
en.editorNote: Send at 6 p.m. sharp, during the office's silent who-can-last-longer contest, to the coworker hesitating to bolt.
variations: Short version: The first person out the door isn't lazy — they're just braver.
Elevator version: The boldest person in the office today isn't the top performer. It's the one who left on time.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 101 Funny Work Quotes — 「meetings that could've been emails」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 今天又開了一場兩小時的會，結論是：這件事其實傳一封信就能講完。我用一個下午的生命，換來一個本來就知道的答案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 散會走回座位的路上傳給同樣被叫去開會的同事，配一個翻白眼貼圖剛好。
variations: 短版：能用一封信解決的事，公司偏要開一場會來證明大家都很忙。
進階版：會議室的真正功能，是讓大家輪流表演自己有在認真工作。

en.content: Sat through another two-hour meeting today. The conclusion? This could have been an email. I traded an entire afternoon of my life for an answer everyone already knew.
en.editorNote: Send on the walk back to your desk to the coworker who got dragged into the same meeting. Pair it with an eye-roll emoji.
variations: Short version: Anything that could be an email becomes a meeting, just to prove everyone's busy.
Advanced version: The real purpose of a conference room is to let everyone take turns performing how hard they work.

items.sourceNote: Douglas Adams 名句「I love deadlines... the whooshing sound they make」改寫，Tivazo 收錄版

zh-tw.content: 我其實滿喜歡截止日的——尤其喜歡它們從我身邊「咻」一聲飛過去的那種瀟灑。
zh-tw.editorNote: deadline 前一晚還在跟同事互相取暖時傳，效果最好，順便約一起留下來加班。
variations: 短版：我跟截止日的關係很穩定，它準時來，我準時來不及。
進階版：時間管理大師說過，最有效率的做法，就是把所有事情都拖到最後一刻再一起爆。

en.content: Honestly, I love deadlines — especially the elegant little whoosh they make as they sail right past me.
en.editorNote: Best sent the night before something is due, while you and a coworker are commiserating. Bonus points for inviting them to stay late together.
variations: Short version: My deadlines and I have a stable relationship — they show up on time, and I don't.
Advanced version: True time management is just stacking everything onto the last possible minute so it can all explode at once.

items.sourceNote: Danfe Office Humor — 「I run on caffeine, chaos, and unresolved emails」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這個人的運作方式很簡單：靠咖啡因撐著、靠一團亂推進、靠收件匣裡那二十封還沒回的信維持心跳。
zh-tw.editorNote: 早上第一杯咖啡下肚後傳給同部門的人，大家會默默舉起自己的杯子致敬。
variations: 短版：我的續航全靠咖啡，沒了咖啡，我就只是一台還沒開機的人。
進階版：別問我今天好不好，問我今天喝了第幾杯。

en.content: My whole operating system is pretty simple: powered by caffeine, propelled by chaos, and kept alive by the twenty unanswered emails in my inbox.
en.editorNote: Send right after the first coffee of the morning hits. Your whole team will quietly raise their mugs in salute.
variations: Short version: I run entirely on coffee. Without it, I'm just a person who hasn't booted up yet.
Advanced version: Don't ask how I'm doing today. Ask which cup I'm on.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 收錄「professional = learned to hide burnout behind a polite front」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 所謂專業，就是學會把自己的過勞藏在一張禮貌的笑臉後面，然後對著鏡頭說：「沒問題，這個我可以。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 被臨時塞了第八個專案、還得在會議上微笑說好的那天傳出去，同事會回你一個「我懂」。
variations: 短版：我笑得越客氣，代表我心裡崩得越徹底。
進階版：成熟的上班族不是不累，是學會在崩潰的同時還能回一句『收到，謝謝』。

en.content: Being a professional just means you've learned to hide your burnout behind a polite smile and say, on cue, 'No problem, I've got this.'
en.editorNote: Send on the day you get handed your eighth project and still have to smile and agree on a call. A coworker will reply with a simple 'I feel this.'
variations: Short version: The more politely I smile, the more completely I'm falling apart inside.
Advanced version: A seasoned employee isn't someone who never burns out — it's someone who can type 'Got it, thanks!' mid-meltdown.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 2026 funny work quotes — 『superpower: looking busy while planning dinner』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我在職場最強的技能，就是一臉認真盯著螢幕，腦袋裡其實在規劃今天晚餐要吃什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下午三點生產力歸零時傳給同事，配一個「你被我發現了」的眼神。
variations: 短版：我看起來很忙，其實只是把表情管理練到滿級。
進階版：認真工作的樣子我演得最好，畢竟這是我每天唯一的演出。

en.content: My greatest workplace skill is staring at my screen with total focus while actually deciding what's for dinner.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker at 3pm when productivity hits zero, paired with a 'you caught me' look.
variations: Short version: I look busy, but really I've just maxed out my poker face.
Advanced version: My best performance every day is pretending to work — it's the only show I put on.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 2026 funny work quotes — 『left my mind in the meeting that should've been an email』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我沒有失去理智，我只是把它留在那場「明明一封信就能解決」的會議裡了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開完一場兩小時毫無結論的會議後傳出去，全組秒回「+1」。
variations: 短版：這場會議唯一的產出，就是消耗掉我整個下午的求生意志。
進階版：會議結束那一刻，我看著行事曆，明天還有三場，默默把咖啡換成續命的。

en.content: I haven't lost my mind — I just left it back in that meeting that could've been an email.
en.editorNote: Send after a two-hour meeting that reached zero conclusions. The whole team replies '+1' instantly.
variations: Short version: The only thing that meeting produced was the death of my afternoon will to live.
Advanced version: The second it ended I checked my calendar, saw three more tomorrow, and quietly upgraded my coffee to life support.

items.sourceNote: Danfe 2026 work stress humor — 『run on caffeine, chaos, and unresolved emails』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我的燃料只有三種：咖啡因、混亂，以及永遠回不完的未讀信件。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週一早上信箱破百封時傳出去，順便問同事要不要團購咖啡續命。
variations: 短版：別問我今天好不好，問我這是第幾杯咖啡。
進階版：我的待辦清單跟頭髮一樣，每天都在掉，但永遠不會清空。

en.content: I run on exactly three things: caffeine, chaos, and an inbox I'll never finish replying to.
en.editorNote: Send Monday morning when your inbox cracks a hundred unread, then ask coworkers to split a coffee order.
variations: Short version: Don't ask how I'm doing today. Ask which cup of coffee I'm on.
Advanced version: My to-do list is like my hairline — shrinking daily, yet somehow never reaching zero.

items.sourceNote: Danfe 2026 office quotes — 『sold my mind to corporate during onboarding』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我沒有丟掉我的靈魂，我是在報到第一天簽合約的時候，連同保密條款一起交給公司了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 新人問你「上班是什麼感覺」的時候傳給他，半開玩笑半警告。
variations: 短版：到職那天我交出的不只是證件影本，還有我的下半輩子。
進階版：員工手冊第一頁沒寫的是：歡迎加入，請把你的週末一併上繳。

en.content: I didn't lose my soul — I handed it over with the NDA on my first day of onboarding.
en.editorNote: Send to a new hire who asks 'so what's this job like?' — half joke, half warning.
variations: Short version: On day one I handed over my ID copies and, apparently, the rest of my life.
Advanced version: Page one of the employee handbook left out the fine print: welcome aboard, please surrender your weekends too.

items.sourceNote: Look 美日誌 社畜厭世語錄35選 — 『餘額不足/收假』厭世金句方向改寫

zh-tw.content: 我對工作沒有什麼不滿，唯一的問題就是：它總是在我最想睡覺的時候開始。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週一早上鬧鐘響第五次後傳給同事，互相確認彼此都還活著。
variations: 短版：我不是不喜歡上班，我只是比較喜歡不上班。
進階版：收假前一晚的我，跟期末考前一晚的我，是同一種絕望。

en.content: I've got no complaints about my job — except that it always starts exactly when I most want to be asleep.
en.editorNote: Send Monday morning after your fifth snooze, just to confirm your coworker is also still alive.
variations: Short version: It's not that I hate working. I just have a strong preference for not working.
Advanced version: The night before a long weekend ends, I feel the exact same dread as the night before a final exam.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo 101 Funny Work Quotes — 『該用 email 解決的會議』經典哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 剛剛開完一個三小時的會，結論是：這個會其實一封信就能講完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 散會走出會議室時傳到部門群組，大家會默默按愛心不敢明講。
variations: 短版：會議的定義就是——一群人花一小時，決定下次再花一小時討論。
進階版：今天又活過一場本來只需要一行字的會議，我覺得我很堅強。

en.content: Just got out of a three-hour meeting. The takeaway: this could've been one email.
en.editorNote: Drop it in the team chat the second you escape the conference room. Expect silent likes from people too scared to say it out loud.
variations: Short version: A meeting is when a group spends an hour deciding to spend another hour discussing it.
Advanced version: Survived another meeting that should have been a single line of text. I'm basically a warrior.

items.sourceNote: Wishful Notes Funny Boss Quotes — 『老闆叫我好好過一天，我就回家了』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 老闆今天跟我說「祝你有美好的一天」，於是我聽話地收拾包包回家了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合心情很差又不想加班的傍晚，傳給最懂你的同事當作下班暗號。
variations: 短版：老闆是那種——他一不在，整個辦公室的氧氣都變多了。
進階版：主管說「把這當成自己的公司」，所以我決定今天提早放自己下班。

en.content: My boss told me to have a great day, so I obediently packed up and went home.
en.editorNote: Perfect for a rough evening when you refuse to do overtime — send it to your closest coworker as a clock-out signal.
variations: Short version: A boss is like a cloud — the moment they're gone, the whole office gets more oxygen.
Advanced version: They told me to treat the company like my own, so I gave myself the afternoon off.

items.sourceNote: Snugfam 150 Sarcastic Work Quotes — 『我在壓力下表現很好』反諷哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我在壓力下表現得很好，只可惜那個壓力現在已經把我壓成一張紙了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 專案 deadline 前一天傳給戰友，順便確認對方還有沒有呼吸。
variations: 短版：我不是在拖延，我是在等截止日逼出我的潛力。
進階版：別人靠咖啡撐過一天，我是靠『再撐一下就週末了』這句謊話。

en.content: I work great under pressure — shame the pressure has now flattened me into a single sheet of paper.
en.editorNote: Send to your project buddy the day before the deadline, and check whether they're still breathing.
variations: Short version: I'm not procrastinating. I'm waiting for the deadline to unlock my full potential.
Advanced version: Some people run on coffee. I run on the lie that the weekend is almost here.

items.sourceNote: 聯合新聞網 15句職場厭世語錄 — 『有錢才善良/發薪日才當好人』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我也是有善良的一面的，通常出現在發薪日當天，而且只維持到隔天午餐前。
zh-tw.editorNote: 發薪日早上傳給同事，順便揪他中午吃好一點，明天就回到平民飲食。
variations: 短版：我的脾氣好不好，要看戶頭餘額決定。
進階版：發薪日的我熱情大方，月底的我連聊天都想節省力氣。

en.content: I do have a kind side. It usually shows up on payday — and expires right before lunch the next morning.
en.editorNote: Send on payday morning and use it to talk a coworker into a nicer lunch. Tomorrow it's back to instant noodles.
variations: Short version: Whether I'm nice or not depends entirely on my account balance.
Advanced version: Payday me is warm and generous. End-of-month me tries to save energy even on small talk.

items.sourceNote: Danfe Hilarious Office Quotes — 『細節控其實只記得零食』哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 主管說我很注重細節，他不知道我記得的細節，全部都是茶水間零食的補貨時間。
zh-tw.editorNote: 績效面談被誇「細心」之後傳給同事自嘲，笑完繼續去巡茶水間。
variations: 短版：我對工作的熱情，跟茶水間有沒有新零食成正比。
進階版：我把『注意細節』的能力全用在記住誰偷喝了我冰箱裡的飲料。

en.content: My manager says I'm detail-oriented. He doesn't know the only details I track are when the break room snacks get restocked.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker after a performance review praises your 'attention to detail,' then go patrol the pantry together.
variations: Short version: My enthusiasm for work is directly proportional to whether there are new snacks in the break room.
Advanced version: I spend all my 'attention to detail' remembering exactly who drank my soda from the office fridge.

items.sourceNote: 聯合新聞網 職場厭世語錄 — 準時下班需要勇氣哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 六點準時關電腦不是能力問題，是膽量問題。我每天都在練膽，可惜進度跟存款一樣慢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 快下班卻沒人敢先走的時候丟到群組，看誰先笑著拿包包。
variations: 短版：準時下班靠的不是效率，是勇氣。
進階版：我已經把『今天一定準時走』設成每天的鬧鐘標籤，按掉的速度比起床還快。

en.content: Logging off at six isn't a skill issue, it's a courage issue. I practice bravery every day — progress is about as fast as my savings.
en.editorNote: Drop this in the group chat when it's quitting time but nobody dares stand up first.
variations: Short version: Leaving on time doesn't take efficiency, it takes guts.
Advanced version: 'Leaving on time today' is the label on my daily alarm. I snooze it faster than I get out of bed.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo Funny Work Quotes — meeting that could've been an email 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 開會的定義：一群人花兩個小時，得出一個一封信就能講完的結論，然後決定下週再開一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 從沒有結論的會議走出來時傳給同事，配一個翻白眼貼圖剛剛好。
variations: 短版：這場會議唯一的產出，是『下次再討論』。
進階版：開會記錄寫的是會議紀要，沒寫的是我這兩小時掉了多少根頭髮。

en.content: A meeting is where ten people spend two hours reaching a conclusion that fit in one email, then schedule another meeting to confirm it.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker as you both walk out of a meeting that produced nothing but a follow-up meeting.
variations: Short version: The only deliverable from that meeting was 'let's circle back next week.'
Advanced version: The minutes recorded the action items. They didn't record how much of my soul left the room.

items.sourceNote: Look Pretty 社畜厭世語錄35選 — 薪水抗物價哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 公司最厲害的成本控制，就是讓我的薪水十年不動，再讓物價替它表演什麼叫與時俱進。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到雞排又漲價的新聞時轉發給同事，一起在群組裡集體嘆氣。
variations: 短版：我的最大本事，是用不變的薪水，應萬變的物價。
進階版：別人說要對抗通膨，我只能對抗想離職的衝動。

en.content: My company's best cost-control strategy is freezing my salary for ten years and letting inflation handle all the personal growth.
en.editorNote: Forward to a coworker the next time your usual lunch spot quietly raises its prices again.
variations: Short version: My greatest talent is meeting ever-rising prices with a never-rising paycheck.
Advanced version: Everyone says fight inflation. I'm just trying to fight the urge to quit.

items.sourceNote: Danfe Hilarious Office Quotes — energy-saving mode 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我不是在偷懶，我是開了省電模式。畫面有點暗，反應有點慢，但至少還沒整個關機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下午三點被同事抓到放空時，用這句神回應，順便補一杯咖啡續命。
variations: 短版：我沒有擺爛，我只是進入低耗能待機。
進階版：我的工作熱情跟手機一樣，過了中午就開始顯示『電量不足』。

en.content: I'm not slacking, I'm in energy-saving mode. The screen's a little dim, the response time's a little slow, but at least I haven't fully shut down.
en.editorNote: Perfect comeback when a coworker catches you zoning out at 3pm — then go refuel with coffee.
variations: Short version: I'm not checked out, I'm just running on low-power standby.
Advanced version: My work enthusiasm is like my phone — by noon it's already flashing 'low battery.'

items.sourceNote: ETtoday 連假後上班族厭世金句 — 收假症候群哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 連假最後一天的傍晚，是一年裡最安靜的悲劇。手機還沒響，但我的靈魂已經提前回到工位上加班了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 收假前一晚發在限動，保證一票同事按愛心兼留言「我也是」。
variations: 短版：放假的快樂是分期付款，收假的痛苦是一次扣清。
進階版：我的收假症候群，從假期第一天就開始倒數了。

en.content: The evening before a long weekend ends is the quietest tragedy of the year. My phone hasn't buzzed yet, but my soul already clocked back in.
en.editorNote: Post this to your story the night before returning to work — watch the 'same' replies roll in.
variations: Short version: Vacation joy comes in installments. The return-to-work pain is charged all at once.
Advanced version: My back-to-work dread starts its countdown on day one of the holiday.

items.sourceNote: Danfe.io office humor — 'a meeting that should have been an email' 經典哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我剛剛活著走出一場會議，整整一小時，最後得出的結論是：這件事其實一封信就能講完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 散會後傳到部門群組，保證一排同事默默按讚不敢出聲。
variations: 短版：這場會議唯一的產出，就是證明它本來不需要開。
進階版：開會前我有靈魂，開會後只剩會議紀錄。

en.content: I just walked out of a meeting alive. One full hour, and the only conclusion was: this could've been an email.
en.editorNote: Drop it in the team chat right after the call ends — watch the silent thumbs-up roll in.
variations: Short version: The only thing that meeting produced was proof it didn't need to happen.
Advanced version: I went in with a soul and came out with meeting minutes.

items.sourceNote: Danfe.io work stress quotes — 把職業倦怠藏在禮貌表情後面的哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 所謂的專業，就是學會把臉上的微笑跟腦中的尖叫，分開管理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開完一場很想翻桌的會之後，發在限動讓懂的人懂。
variations: 短版：我臉上很冷靜，是因為我把崩潰外包給回家的路上了。
進階版：成熟不是不想離職，是學會邊微笑邊投履歷。

en.content: Being a professional just means learning to run the smile on your face and the scream in your head as two separate departments.
en.editorNote: Post after a meeting you really wanted to flip a table over. The right people will get it.
variations: Short version: I look calm because I outsourced the breakdown to my commute home.
Advanced version: Maturity isn't not wanting to quit — it's smiling while you update your résumé.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo sarcastic work quotes — work-life balance 反諷哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 公司很重視我的工作與生活平衡：工作的部分歸公司，生活的部分也順便歸公司。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下班還在收訊息的時候傳給戰友，一起在群組裡假笑。
variations: 短版：我的工作與生活早就平衡了，因為兩邊都是工作。
進階版：他們說可以彈性上班，意思是哪裡有訊號就在哪裡加班。

en.content: My company really values my work-life balance: the work part belongs to them, and the life part — also them.
en.editorNote: Send to your work bestie while you're still answering Slack after hours. Misery loves a group chat.
variations: Short version: My work and life are perfectly balanced, because both of them are work.
Advanced version: They call it flexible hours. It just means I work wherever there's signal.

items.sourceNote: ZenHR 2026 work memes — 全部回覆/reply all 群組災難哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 公司最團結的一刻，就是有人手滑按了「全部回覆」，然後三十個人一起回「請不要全部回覆」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 信箱被洗版的時候轉給同事，順便比賽誰先收到第十封「+1」。
variations: 短版：一封誤觸的全部回覆，能讓全公司瞬間變成一個家庭群組。
進階版：辦公室的團隊精神，平常看不到，按錯回覆鍵的那天全都出現了。

en.content: The most united my company ever gets is when someone hits Reply All by accident, and thirty people reply 'please stop replying all.'
en.editorNote: Forward to a coworker mid-inbox-flood. Bonus points for racing to count the tenth '+1'.
variations: Short version: One stray Reply All turns the whole company into a chaotic family group chat.
Advanced version: Office team spirit is invisible — until someone fat-fingers Reply All.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo relatable work quotes — 假裝在忙/looking busy 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 在公司，我最高超的技能不是做事，是在主管經過的瞬間，把表情切換成「我正在處理很重要的事」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 主管巡視結束後傳給隔壁同事，兩人對視一秒就懂了。
variations: 短版：我同時開了八個視窗，其中七個是用來假裝在忙的。
進階版：真正的辦公室生存術，是讓滑鼠看起來比你還努力。

en.content: My most advanced skill at work isn't doing the job — it's switching my face to 'handling something critical' the instant my boss walks by.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker next to you right after the boss finishes a lap. One glance and you both know.
variations: Short version: I have eight tabs open. Seven of them exist purely to look busy.
Advanced version: True office survival is making your mouse look harder-working than you are.

items.sourceNote: 聯合新聞網 15句職場厭世語錄 — 抗壓力/物價哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 面試的時候我說我抗壓性很強，現在才懂那句話的意思是：用不會漲的薪水，撐住會一直漲的物價。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到帳單漲價時傳到家族群組或同事群，大家一起苦笑。
variations: 短版：我最強的能力是用固定薪水扛浮動物價。
進階版：公司問我願不願意挑戰高壓環境，我說我每天買菜就在挑戰了。

en.content: In the interview I said I handle pressure well. Turns out that meant surviving rising prices on a salary that never moves.
en.editorNote: Drop it in the group chat the moment groceries get more expensive. Universal pain, instant bonding.
variations: Short version: My superpower is absorbing inflation with a frozen paycheck.
Advanced version: They asked if I could thrive under pressure. Sir, I do my own grocery shopping.

items.sourceNote: Look Pretty 美日誌 社畜厭世語錄35選 — 動物園/做完工作哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 能撐到下班、把今天的工作做完、還順便吃到一頓飯，我就覺得自己今天已經很了不起了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下班前傳給同事，互相肯定一下「今天我們真的辛苦了」。
variations: 短版：活著走出辦公室，就是今天最大的成就。
進階版：別人在追求自我實現，我在追求準時下班，我們都是有目標的人。

en.content: If I make it to clock-out, finish today's tasks, and squeeze in an actual meal, I consider that a genuinely impressive day.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker before clocking out — a little mutual 'we survived today' validation.
variations: Short version: Walking out of the office alive is the achievement.
Advanced version: Some people chase self-actualization. I chase leaving on time. We both have goals.

items.sourceNote: Danfe funny quotes about work stress — meetings/saying nothing 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 開會就是一群人花一個小時，認真地把一句話可以講完的事，講成不需要結論的藝術。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在冗長會議中偷傳給同事，幫他撐過剩下的四十分鐘。
variations: 短版：這場會議唯一的結論，就是要再開一場會。
進階版：會議室是唯一一個你可以睜著眼睛睡覺、還能領薪水的地方。

en.content: A meeting is a group of people spending an hour turning a one-sentence update into the fine art of reaching no conclusion.
en.editorNote: Slide it to a coworker mid-meeting to help them survive the remaining forty minutes.
variations: Short version: The only outcome of this meeting was scheduling another meeting.
Advanced version: A conference room is the one place you can sleep with your eyes open and still get paid.

items.sourceNote: Danfe hilarious office quotes — hide burnout behind polite front 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 所謂的專業，就是把快要燒光的自己，藏在一張「我很好、沒問題、馬上處理」的笑臉後面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 撐著回覆完第十封信時傳給戰友，互相確認彼此都還在硬撐。
variations: 短版：我外表很穩，內心的進度條早就紅燈了。
進階版：成熟的職場人，就是學會把崩潰排程到下班以後。

en.content: Being a professional just means hiding your nearly-burnt-out self behind a polite 'all good, no problem, on it right away.'
en.editorNote: Send to a work ally as you finish replying to the tenth email — a quiet check that you're both still hanging on.
variations: Short version: I look composed. My internal progress bar has been flashing red for hours.
Advanced version: Workplace maturity is learning to schedule your breakdown for after hours.

items.sourceNote: Uncommon Quotes — 'left my mind in the meeting room' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我沒有失去理智，我只是把它留在剛剛那場會議室裡了，散會以後也懶得回去拿。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開完一場毫無意義的會，傳給一起被困在裡面的同事，互相確認大家都還沒瘋。
variations: 短版：會議結束，我的腦袋也順便登出了。
進階版：人家是去開會充電，我是去開會把僅剩的一格電也耗光。

en.content: I didn't lose my mind — I just left it back in that meeting room, and honestly I'm too tired to go get it.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who was trapped in the same pointless meeting — mutual confirmation that you're both still (barely) sane.
variations: Short version: Meeting's over, and my brain logged off right along with it.
Advanced version: Some people leave meetings recharged. I leave with my last 1% drained.

items.sourceNote: Chuckles Life remote work quotes — 'home office where productivity naps' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 在家工作最大的好處，就是我可以很安靜地把每個人都已讀不回；最大的壞處，就是我的生產力也在沙發上躺平了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在家上班滑到下午三點才開第一個檔案時，傳給同樣遠端的朋友自首。
variations: 短版：通勤距離從床到桌子三步，遲到的藉口也一起省了。
進階版：公司以為我在遠端衝刺，其實我在遠端跟我的貓開會。

en.content: The best part of working from home is I can ignore everyone very quietly. The worst part is that my productivity is also lying flat on the couch.
en.editorNote: Send to a fellow remote worker the day you don't open your first file until 3pm — a shared confession.
variations: Short version: My commute is three steps from bed to desk, and so is my excuse for being late.
Advanced version: The company thinks I'm grinding remotely. Really I'm in a remote meeting with my cat.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo funny work quotes — 'energy-saving mode / avoiding coworkers' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我不是懶，我只是進入了省電模式；我的工作成就，百分之九十九靠咖啡，剩下百分之一靠成功閃避同事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週三下午茶時間傳給戰友，順便提醒對方一起去買杯續命的咖啡。
variations: 短版：我沒有擺爛，我是在執行低耗能策略。
進階版：辦公室生存術第一條：在咖啡見底之前，絕對不要跟任何人對到眼。

en.content: I'm not lazy, I'm just in energy-saving mode. My career is ninety-nine percent coffee and one percent successfully dodging coworkers.
en.editorNote: Send to a work ally at Wednesday afternoon-tea o'clock — and nudge them to grab a life-saving coffee with you.
variations: Short version: I'm not slacking, I'm running a low-power strategy.
Advanced version: Office survival rule number one: do not make eye contact with anyone before your coffee runs out.

items.sourceNote: Pleated Jeans burnout tweets — 'system stopped making sense but bills exist' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 去上班這件事，早就不太合理了，但我們每天還是準時出現，因為帳單它不懂什麼叫做厭世。
zh-tw.editorNote: 月初帳單一起來的早晨傳給同事，互相打氣繼續為了房租硬撐下去。
variations: 短版：我長期厭世，但我更長期地需要付房租。
進階版：支撐我每天起床上班的不是夢想，是我的水電瓦斯帳單。

en.content: Going to work stopped making sense a while ago, but we all still show up on time, because the bills don't care how burnt out we are.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker on the morning the start-of-month bills land — mutual fuel to keep grinding for rent.
variations: Short version: I'm chronically burnt out, but I'm even more chronically in need of paying rent.
Advanced version: What gets me out of bed every morning isn't a dream — it's the electricity bill.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo sarcastic work quotes — 'meeting that should have been an email' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我剛剛在一場開了兩小時的會議裡，活了下來，而那場會的全部結論，用一封三行的信就能講完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開完冗長的會議走回座位時傳給同組的人，附上一個死魚眼表情更傳神。
variations: 短版：這場會議的存在，唯一證明了一封信也能拖成一個下午。
進階版：會議的定義就是一群人把一封信，慎重地朗讀兩個小時。

en.content: I just survived a two-hour meeting whose entire conclusion could've fit in a three-line email.
en.editorNote: Send to your teammate as you trudge back to your desk after a marathon meeting. Add a dead-eyed emoji for full effect.
variations: Short version: This meeting proved one thing — an email can be stretched into a whole afternoon.
Advanced version: A meeting is just a group of people solemnly reading an email out loud for two hours.

items.sourceNote: Laughter College work-life balance quotes — 'thinking about bed at desk, desk in bed' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我的工作與生活平衡得很完美：在公司想著回家的床，回到床上想著公司沒做完的事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 深夜還在滑手機卻睡不著時，傳給同樣失眠的同事，証明你們的平衡都壞掉了。
variations: 短版：所謂平衡，就是上班累、下班也累，兩邊一樣累。
進階版：我有完美的工作生活平衡——上班焦慮，下班疲憊，剛好對半分。

en.content: My work-life balance is flawless: at my desk I think about my bed, and in my bed I think about everything I left unfinished at my desk.
en.editorNote: Send to an equally insomniac coworker at midnight when you're scrolling but can't sleep — proof you're both perfectly unbalanced.
variations: Short version: Balance just means being tired at work and tired at home, evenly split.
Advanced version: I have a perfect work-life balance — stressed on the clock, exhausted off it, fifty-fifty.

items.sourceNote: Danfe office humor — 'here physically, emotionally no' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我人是準時到公司了，但我的靈魂還塞在週末的車陣裡，估計要到星期三才會抵達。
zh-tw.editorNote: 週一早上開晨會前傳到群組，幫大家集體確認今天確實只有肉體上班。
variations: 短版：人到了，魂還在路上，請耐心等候。
進階版：我現在的狀態是『離線值班中』，本人已讀不回，請洽明天的我。

en.content: My body clocked in on time, but my soul is still stuck in weekend traffic and won't arrive until Wednesday.
en.editorNote: Drop it in the group chat before the Monday standup, so everyone can confirm only their bodies showed up today.
variations: Short version: Present in body, soul still en route — please hold.
Advanced version: My current status is 'on duty but offline.' I'm seen-zoning everything; please contact tomorrow's me.

items.sourceNote: Parade funny work quotes — 'deadlines whooshing as they fly by' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我跟截止日的關係很穩定：它總是準時出現，而我總是準時假裝沒看到它從旁邊呼嘯而過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 進度落後又快要交件那天傳給一起拖延的戰友，互相安慰大家都一樣。
variations: 短版：我不是趕不上截止日，我只是選擇跟它揮手道別。
進階版：截止日最美的聲音，就是它從你眼前飛過去的那一聲『咻』。

en.content: Me and deadlines have a steady relationship: they always show up on time, and I always pretend not to notice them whooshing right past me.
en.editorNote: Send to your fellow procrastinator on a deadline day when you're both behind — mutual reassurance that everyone's the same.
variations: Short version: I don't miss deadlines, I choose to wave them goodbye.
Advanced version: The most beautiful sound a deadline makes is the little 'whoosh' as it flies straight past you.

items.sourceNote: Tivazo sarcastic work quotes — 'looking busy while planning dinner / muting at the right time' 哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 上班這幾年我練成的最強技能，就是表面上專注盯著螢幕，腦中其實已經把今天晚餐想好三套方案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 視訊會議鏡頭關起來、麥克風靜音的當下傳給同事，懂的人會秒回一個讚。
variations: 短版：我看起來在工作，其實在認真決定晚上要吃什麼。
進階版：在對的時間把自己靜音，是現代上班族最重要的求生技能。

en.content: After years on the job, my strongest skill is staring intently at my screen while my brain has already drafted three dinner options for tonight.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker the moment your camera's off and your mic is muted in a video call — the right people will reply with an instant thumbs-up.
variations: Short version: I look like I'm working, but I'm seriously deciding what to eat tonight.
Advanced version: Muting yourself at exactly the right moment is the most essential survival skill of the modern office worker.

items.sourceNote: Alibaba funny sarcastic work quotes — 'a meeting that should've been an email' 經典哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 今天又開了一場一小時的會，散會後我才想通：這整件事其實只要一封信、三行字就解決了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 剛從一場無意義的會議走出來，傳給同樣被叫去陪坐的同事，瞬間共鳴。
variations: 短版：這場會議唯一的結論，就是它根本不該存在。
進階版：能用一封信講完的事，老闆偏要召集八個人坐一小時，這就是排場。

en.content: Sat through another hour-long meeting today, and only afterward did it hit me: the whole thing could've been one email, three lines, done.
en.editorNote: Send to the coworker who got dragged into the same pointless meeting the second you both walk out — instant solidarity.
variations: Short version: The only conclusion from that meeting was that it never should've happened.
Advanced version: Anything that fits in one email, the boss insists on gathering eight people for an hour — that's not efficiency, that's a show.

items.sourceNote: 經濟日報 15句職場厭世語錄 — 「準時下班需要的不是努力，是勇氣」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 準時下班從來不是能力問題，而是勇氣問題——你得有膽量在大家都還埋頭時，光明正大地站起來收包包。
zh-tw.editorNote: 六點整猶豫要不要走的時候傳給同事，給彼此一點走人的勇氣。
variations: 短版：下班打卡那一刻，需要的不是力氣，是膽量。
進階版：辦公室裡最勇敢的人，不是加班到最後的，而是六點準時關電腦的那個。

en.content: Leaving on time was never about ability, it's about courage — you need the guts to stand up and pack your bag while everyone else is still hunched over their desks.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker when it's 6 p.m. sharp and you're both hesitating to leave — a little mutual permission to go home.
variations: Short version: Clocking out on time doesn't take effort, it takes nerve.
Advanced version: The bravest person in the office isn't the one staying latest — it's the one shutting the laptop at six on the dot.

items.sourceNote: 經濟日報 15句職場厭世語錄 — 「以不變的薪水應萬變的物價」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 我這輩子最穩定的東西就是薪水：不管物價漲幾倍，它永遠堅守原地，一動也不動。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到帳單或又一波漲價新聞時傳給同事，苦中作樂一下。
variations: 短版：什麼都在漲，只有我的薪水歲月靜好。
進階版：物價是火箭，薪水是石頭，我每個月都在見證這場不公平的賽跑。

en.content: The most stable thing in my life is my paycheck: no matter how many times prices double, it holds its ground and refuses to budge an inch.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker when a bill lands or another round of price hikes hits the news — laugh so you don't cry.
variations: Short version: Everything's going up except my salary, which is enjoying its peaceful retirement.
Advanced version: Prices are a rocket, my paycheck is a rock, and every month I witness the same unfair race.

items.sourceNote: Danfe office humor — 'burnout is my natural glow / productivity is panic with spreadsheets' 哏融合改寫

zh-tw.content: 別人問我臉上那層光是什麼，我都說是青春的光彩——其實那是燃燒殆盡前的最後一點餘溫。
zh-tw.editorNote: 撐到週四快沒電的時候傳給同樣快燒乾的戰友，互相認領一下。
variations: 短版：我臉上不是氣色好，是燃燒過度的反光。
進階版：所謂的生產力，不過是配上試算表的恐慌而已。

en.content: When people ask what that glow on my face is, I say it's youthful radiance — really it's just the last bit of warmth before I burn out completely.
en.editorNote: Send to a fellow worker running on fumes by Thursday — a little mutual acknowledgment that you're both fried.
variations: Short version: That's not a healthy glow on my face, it's the reflection of me burning out.
Advanced version: What we call productivity is really just panic with a spreadsheet attached.

items.sourceNote: UpToGo 上班族厭世語錄 — 「連自己的排班表都改變不了」哏改寫

zh-tw.content: 小時候以為長大能改變世界，出社會才發現，我連這個月的排班表都喬不動。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到下個月班表又被排得亂七八糟時傳給同事，會心一笑。
variations: 短版：曾經想改變世界，現在只想改一下我的休假日。
進階版：長大後最大的領悟，是世界沒改變我，倒是排班表把我改造得很徹底。

en.content: As a kid I thought I'd grow up to change the world; out in the real world I found out I can't even get this month's shift schedule changed.
en.editorNote: Send to a coworker when next month's schedule comes out a mess — a knowing little laugh.
variations: Short version: I used to want to change the world, now I just want to swap one day off.
Advanced version: The biggest lesson of growing up: the world never changed me, but the shift schedule remade me completely.
